'''Greeb''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Admiral/Legends|admiral]], whose fleet held station over [[Ithor/Legends|Ithor]] in [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]]. His fleet was driven away from Ithor by the forces of Admiral [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Gial Ackbar]], during a [[Battle of Ithor (0 ABY)|battle]] at Ithor.

{{Char-stub}}
